ground_truth.title: County pauses most 4-H Center events
ground_truth.author: Lia Salvatierra
ground_truth.main_content: Ouray County leaders decided Tuesday to cancel most 4-H Event Center and Fairgrounds events after San Juan Skijoring in January, until the county comes up with a plan to manage the space. Budget cuts eliminated staff; work session planned with new manager.
with: Ouray County leaders decided Tuesday to cancel most 4-H Event Center and Fairgrounds events after San Juan Skijoring in January
The county came up with a plan to manage the space
Budget cuts eliminated staff from the 4-H Event Center and Fairgrounds
A work session is planned with a new manager
Most events will be paused until further notice
